name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BakeryMutex ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

(* Process identifiers *)
VARIABLES turn, state

(* State values *)
Idle == 0
Trying == 1
Critical == 2

(* Initial state: all processes idle, no turn assigned *)
Init == /\ turn = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> Idle]

(* Helper: set of processes currently in critical section *)
InCritical == {i \in 1..N : state[i] = Critical}

(* Mutual exclusion invariant: at most one process in critical section *)
TypeOK == Len(InCritical) <= 1

(* Transition: process i enters trying state *)
EnterTrying(i) ==
  /\ i \in 1..N
  /\ state[i] = Idle
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = Trying]
  /\ UNCHANGED turn

(* Transition: process i obtains the highest ticket and enters critical section *)
EnterCritical(i) ==
  /\ i \in 1..N
  /\ state[i] = Trying
  /\ turn' = [turn EXCEPT ![i] = Max({turn[j] : j \in 1..N}) + 1]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = Critical]

(* Transition: process i exits critical section *)
ExitCritical(i) ==
  /\ i \in 1..N
  /\ state[i] = Critical
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = Idle]
  /\ UNCHANGED turn

(* Next-state relation: any process may perform one of the above actions *)
Next ==
  \E i \in 1..N :
    EnterTrying(i) \/ EnterCritical(i) \/ ExitCritical(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Participants

(* Each participant is identified by a natural number in 1..N *)
ParticipantsSet == 1..N

(* States of participants: "Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted" *)
State == {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}

(* State of the coordinator: "Start", "Voting", "Deciding", "Done" *)
CoordState == {"Start", "Voting", "Deciding", "Done"}

VARIABLES pState, coordState

(* Initial state: all participants are in Init, coordinator in Start *)
Init == /\ pState = [i \in ParticipantsSet |-> "Init"]
        /\ coordState = "Start"

(* Helper: all participants have voted yes (Prepared) *)
AllYes == \A i \in ParticipantsSet: pState[i] = "Prepared"

(* Helper: any participant voted no (Aborted) *)
AnyNo == \E i \in ParticipantsSet: pState[i] = "Aborted"

(* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
PrepareAll == /\ coordState = "Start"
               /\ coordState' = "Voting"

(* Participant i votes yes: moves from Init to Prepared *)
VoteYes(i) == /\ coordState = "Voting"
              /\ pState[i] = "Init"
              /\ pState' = [pState EXCEPT ![i] = "Prepared"]

(* Participant i votes no: moves from Init to Aborted *)
VoteNo(i) == /\ coordState = "Voting"
             /\ pState[i] = "Init"
             /\ pState' = [pState EXCEPT ![i] = "Aborted"]

(* Coordinator decides to commit if all voted yes *)
DecideCommit == /\ coordState = "Voting"
                /\ AllYes
                /\ coordState' = "Deciding"
                /\ UNCHANGED pState

(* Coordinator decides to abort if any voted no *)
DecideAbort == /\ coordState = "Voting"
                /\ AnyNo
                /\ coordState' = "Deciding"
                /\ UNCHANGED pState

(* Commit phase: all participants move to Committed *)
CommitAll == /\ coordState = "Deciding"
              /\ coordState' = "Done"
              /\ pState' = [i \in ParticipantsSet |-> "Committed"]

(* Abort phase: all participants remain Aborted *)
AbortAll == /\ coordState = "Deciding"
             /\ coordState' = "Done"
             /\ pState' = [i \in ParticipantsSet |-> "Aborted"]

Next == \/ PrepareAll
        \/ \E i \in ParticipantsSet: VoteYes(i)
        \/ \E i \in ParticipantsSet: VoteNo(i)
        \/ DecideCommit
        \/ DecideAbort
        \/ CommitAll
        \/ AbortAll

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<pState, coordState>>

(* Invariant: no participant can be Committed unless all are Committed *)
TypeOK == \A i \in ParticipantsSet: pState[i] \in State

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

(* Forks are numbered 0..N-1 *)
VARIABLES forks, state

(* State of each philosopher: "thinking", "hungry", "eating" *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> 0]  \* 0 means free, 1 means held
        /\ state = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> "thinking"]

Left(i) == (i - 1) % N
Right(i) == (i + 1) % N

PickUp(i) ==
  /\ forks[i] = 0
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 1]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<forks, state>>

PutDown(i) ==
  /\ forks[i] = 1
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<forks, state>>

Next == \E i \in 0..N-1 :
          (state[i] = "thinking" /\ forks[i] = 0 /\ forks[Left(i)] = 0 /\ PickUp(i))
        \/ (state[i] = "eating" /\ PutDown(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

TypeOK == /\ forks \in [0..N-1 -> {0,1}]
          /\ state \in [0..N-1 -> {"thinking","hungry","eating"}]

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N \* number of processes, N >= 1, N

VARIABLES num, flag

(* num[i] is the ticket number of process i, 0 means not waiting *)
(* flag[i] = TRUE means process i is choosing a ticket *)

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Helper: maximum ticket number among all processes *)
maxNum == MAX { num[j] : j \in 1..N }

(* Process i starts to enter critical section *)
Enter(i) ==
  /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
  /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = maxNum + 1]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

(* Process i leaves critical section *)
Leave(i) ==
  /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
  /\ UNCHANGED flag

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          (Enter(i) \/ Leave(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

(* Mutual exclusion: no two processes in critical section simultaneously *)
TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> 1..N]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* q is a sequence of length K, head and tail are indices modulo K, size is the number of elements *)

Init == 
    /\ q = << >>
    /\ head = 0
    /\ tail = 0
    /\ size = 0

Producer(x) == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, x)
    /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % K
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ head' = head

Consumer == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ q' = Tail(q)
    /\ head' = (head + 1) % K
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ tail' = tail

Next == \E x \in 1..K: Producer(x) \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
    /\ head \in 0..K-1
    /\ tail \in 0..K-1
    /\ size \in 0..K

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N \* number of servers, NULL
ASSUME N \in Nat /\ N > 0

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

States == {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = [i \in 1..N |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "Follower"]

ElectionTimeout == /\ \A i \in 1..N : state[i] = "Follower"
                    /\ currentTerm > 0

RequestVote(i, j) == /\ state[i] = "Candidate"
                     /\ currentTerm = currentTerm
                     /\ votedFor[i] = NULL
                     /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![j] = i]
                     /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, state>>

VoteGranted(i, j) == /\ state[i] = "Follower"
                    /\ currentTerm = currentTerm
                    /\ votedFor[i] = NULL
                    /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![j] = i]
                    /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, state>>

Majority(votes) == \E majority \in 1..N : votes >= majority

LeaderElection(i) == /\ state[i] = "Candidate"
                     /\ Majority(\# [j \in 1..N |-> votedFor[j] = i])

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          \/ RequestVote(i, i)
          \/ VoteGranted(i, i)
          \/ LeaderElection(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == readers = 0 /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next ==
  \/ \E r \in 1..N:
        /\ readers' = readers + 1
        /\ writer_active' = writer_active
  \/ \E w \in 1..N:
        /\ readers' = readers
        /\ writer_active' = TRUE
  \/ writer_active' = FALSE

TypeOK == readers \in Nat /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamport ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANT N, Proc, Chan, UNDEFINED

(* Each process has a unique identifier in Proc. 
   Chan is the set of directed channels (p,q) with p,q in Proc. *)

VARIABLES state, channel, recvd, finished

(* state[p] is the local state of process p (abstract value). 
   channel[(p,q)] is the sequence of messages currently in transit 
   on channel from p to q. 
   recvd[p] is the set of marker messages received by p from each 
   incoming neighbor. 
   finished[p] is TRUE iff p has recorded its state and sent markers. *)

(* Initial state: all processes have not recorded state, all channels empty *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in Proc |-> UNDEFINED]
        /\ channel = [c \in Chan |-> <<>>]
        /\ recvd = [p \in Proc |-> {}]
        /\ finished = [p \in Proc |-> FALSE]

(* Sending a normal message from p to q *)
SendMsg(p, q, m) == 
  /\ channel'[(p, q)] = Append(channel[(p, q)], m)
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recvd, finished>>

(* Sending a marker from p to all outgoing neighbors *)
SendMarker(p) ==
  /\ \A q \in Proc : (p, q) \in Chan
        /\ channel'[(p, q)] = Append(channel[(p, q)], "marker")
  /\ finished' = [finished EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recvd>>

(* Receiving a message on channel (q, p) *)
RecvMsg(q, p) ==
  LET m == Head(channel[(q, p)]) IN
  /\ channel'[(q, p)] = Tail(channel[(q, p)])
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = f(state[p], m)]  (* f is local update *)
  /\ UNCHANGED <<recvd, finished>>

(* Receiving a marker on channel (q, p) *)
RecvMarker(q, p) ==
  LET m == Head(channel[(q, p)]) IN
  /\ channel'[(q, p)] = Tail(channel[(q, p)])
  /\ recvd' = [recvd EXCEPT ![p] = @ \cup {q}]
  /\ \* If first marker, record state and send markers
      (simplified: record state when all markers received)
      /\ IF recvd' = {q : (q, p) \in Chan} THEN
           state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = LocalState(p)]

           state' = state
  /\ UNCHANGED finished

(* A process can send a marker only after recording its state *)
CanSendMarker(p) == finished[p] = FALSE /\ recvd[p] = {q : (q, p) \in Chan}

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  \E p \in Proc :
    \E q \in Proc :
      /\ (p, q) \in Chan
      /\ \E m \in {"msg", "marker"} :

            SendMsg(p, q, m)


              SendMarker(p)

              UNDEFINED
  \/ \E p \in Proc :
      \E q \in Proc :
        /\ (q, p) \in Chan
        /\ channel[(q, p)] # <<>>
        /\ LET m == Head(channel[(q, p)]) IN

              RecvMarker(q, p)

              RecvMsg(q, p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, recvd, finished>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [Proc -> State]
          /\ channel \in [Chan -> Seq(Message)]
          /\ recvd \in [Proc -> SUBSET Proc]
          /\ finished \in [Proc -> BOOLEAN]

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N \in Nat /\ N > 0

VARIABLES token, sent

(* token: 1..N, the node currently holding the token
   sent: set of messages that have been sent *)

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ sent = {}

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ token' = IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1
          /\ sent' = IF i = 1 THEN sent \cup {1} ELSE sent

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, sent>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

(* State variables *)
VARIABLE store

(* Initial state: empty store *)
Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

(* Helper: update store with a new key-value pair *)
Update(k, v) == store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

(* Next-state relation: either a Put or a Get operation *)
Next ==
  \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
    (Update(k, v))

(* Spec: init and next *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

(* Invariant: store always maps keys to values or NULL *)
TypeOK == \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values \/ store[k] = NULL

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PaxosSingleDecree ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V, NULL

(* Ballot numbers are natural numbers *)
Ballot == Nat

(* State of each acceptor: [promised: Ballot, accepted: [value: V, ballot: Ballot] \cup {none}] *)
AcceptorState == [promised: Ballot, accepted: [value: V, ballot: Ballot] \cup {none}]

(* Global state *)
VARIABLES acceptors, proposer, chosen, haven

(* Initial state: no promises, no accepts, no chosen value *)
Init ==
    /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [promised |-> 0, accepted |-> [value |-> NULL, ballot |-> 0]]]
    /\ proposer = [p \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]
    /\ chosen = NULL

(* Proposer increments its ballot and proposes a value *)
Propose(p, v) ==
    LET b == proposer[p].ballot + 1 IN
    /\ proposer' = [proposer EXCEPT ![p].ballot = b, ![p].value = v]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, chosen>>

(* Acceptors respond to prepare: promise not to accept lower ballots *)
Prepare(p) ==
    /\ \E i \in 1..N: acceptors[i].promised < proposer[p].ballot
    /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![i].promised = proposer[p].ballot | i \in 1..N]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<proposer, chosen>>

(* Acceptors accept the proposal if they haven't promised a higher ballot *)
Accept(p) ==
    /\ \A i \in 1..N: acceptors[i].promised = proposer[p].ballot
    /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![i].accepted = [value |-> proposer[p].value, ballot |-> proposer[p].ballot] | i \in 1..N]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<proposer, chosen>>

(* Once a majority accepts, the value is chosen *)
Choose(v) ==
    /\ \A i \in 1..N: acceptors[i].accepted.value = v
    /\ chosen' = v
    /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, proposer>>

Next == 
    \E p \in 1..M : \E v \in V :
        Propose(p, v) \/ Prepare(p) \/ Accept(p) \/ Choose(v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposer, chosen>>

(* Invariant: once chosen, it never changes *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ chosen \in V \cup {NULL}
    /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> AcceptorState]
    /\ proposer \in [1..M -> [ballot: Ballot, value: V]]

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolation ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Clients, Keys, Values
VARIABLES active, db, reads, snapshot, status, t, writes


(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Type invariant: all variables have the expected type                 *)
(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ db \in [Keys -> Values]
    /\ active \subseteq Clients
    /\ reads \in [Clients -> SUBSET Keys]
    /\ writes \in [Clients -> [Keys -> Values]]
    /\ snapshot \in [Clients -> [Keys -> Values]]
    /\ status \in [Clients -> {"idle", "active", "committed", "aborted"}]

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Initial state: empty database, no active transactions               *)
(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
Init ==
    /\ db = [k \in Keys |-> 0]          \* initial value 0 for all keys
    /\ active = {}
    /\ reads = [c \in Clients |-> {}]
    /\ writes = [c \in Clients |-> [k \in Keys |-> 0]]
    /\ snapshot = [c \in Clients |-> [k \in Keys |-> 0]]
    /\ status = [c \in Clients |-> "idle"]

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Transaction begin: pick an idle client, mark it active, take snapshot *)
(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)

    /\ t \in Clients
    /\ status[t] = "idle"
    /\ status' = [status EXCEPT ![t] = "active"]
    /\ active' = active \cup {t}
    /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![t] = db]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<db, reads, writes>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Read operation: read from snapshot if not written yet, else from local write set *)
(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
Read(t, k) ==
    /\ t \in active
    /\ k \in Keys
    /\ \E v : (k \in DOMAIN writes[t] /\ writes[t][k] = v) \/ (k \notin DOMAIN writes[t] /\ snapshot[t][k] = v)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<db, active, reads, writes, snapshot, status>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Write operation: record write in local write set *)
(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
Write(t, k, v) ==
    /\ t \in active
    /\ k \in Keys
    /\ v \in Values
    /\ writes' = [writes EXCEPT ![t][k] = v]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<db, active, reads, snapshot, status>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Commit: check for write-write conflicts, if none, apply writes to db *)
(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
Commit(t) ==
    /\ t \in active
    /\ \A t' \in active \ {t} :
           \A k \in DOMAIN(writes[t]) :
               k \notin DOMAIN(writes[t'])
    /\ db' = [db EXCEPT ![k] = IF k \in DOMAIN(writes[t]) THEN writes[t][k] ELSE @]
    /\ status' = [status EXCEPT ![t] = "committed"]
    /\ active' = active \ {t}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<reads, writes, snapshot>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Abort: simply mark transaction as aborted *)
(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
Abort(t) ==
    /\ t \in active
    /\ status' = [status EXCEPT ![t] = "aborted"]
    /\ active' = active \ {t}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<db, reads, writes, snapshot>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Next-state relation: nondeterministic choice among actions          *)
(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
Next ==
    \E t \in Clients :
        \/ Begin(t)
        \/ \E k \in Keys : Read(t, k)
        \/ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : Write(t, k, v)
        \/ Commit(t)
        \/ Abort(t)

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Temporal specification: initial state and next-step relation       *)
(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<db, active, reads, writes, snapshot, status>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Safety property: no two committed transactions write the same key  *)
(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
NoConflicts ==
    \A t1, t2 \in Clients :
        t1 # t2 =>
            \A k \in Keys :
                (t1 \in {t : status[t] = "committed"} /\ t2 \in {t : status[t] = "committed"}) =>
                    ~ (k \in DOMAIN(writes[t1]) /\ k \in DOMAIN(writes[t2]))

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, epsilon

(* --algorithm ClockSync
              /\ sum(clocks) \div N;
  sync_step == 
    \E i \in 1..N :
      LET new_clock == average + drift(i)
      IN clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = @ + new_clock];
  round == 
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : clocks[i] = 0
    /\ UNCHANGED <<clocks, offsets>>;
  init == 
    /\ N = 3
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : clocks[i] = 0
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : offsets[i] = 0;
  next == sync_step;
end-algorithm *)

VARIABLES clocks

(* Initial state: all clocks start at 0 *)
Init == \A i \in 1..N : clocks[i] = 0

(* Helper: compute the average of all clock values *)
Avg == (/\ sum(clocks) % N = 0)
        /\ sum(clocks) \div N

(* Helper: compute the maximum difference between any two clocks *)
MaxDiff ==
  LET diffs == {Abs(clocks[i] - clocks[j]) : i, j \in 1..N}
  IN IF \E d \in diffs : TRUE
     THEN CHOOSE d \in diffs : d


(* One synchronization step: each node adjusts its clock towards the average *)
Step ==
  /\ \A i \in 1..N :
       LET new_val == Avg
       IN clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = @ + new_val]

(* One round: a full cycle of synchronization steps *)
Round ==
  /\ \A i \in 1..N : clocks[i] = 0
  /\ UNCHANGED <<clocks>>

(* Next-state relation: either a step or a round *)
Next ==
  Step \lor Round

(* Invariant: all clocks stay within epsilon of each other *)
TypeOK == MaxDiff <= epsilon

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks>>

====

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS P1, P2

VARIABLES flag, turn, P1, P2

(* State space: flag is a function from {P1, P2} to BOOLEAN
   indicating whether each process is interested in entering
   the critical section.  turn is either P1 or P2, indicating
   whose turn it is if both are interested. *)

Init == /\ flag = [P1 |-> FALSE, P2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = P1

(* Process P1's actions *)
P1Enter == /\ flag[P1] = FALSE
           /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![P1] = TRUE]
           /\ UNCHANGED turn

P1Try == /\ flag[P1] = TRUE
         /\ flag[P2] = TRUE
         /\ turn' = P2
         /\ UNCHANGED flag

P1Exit == /\ flag[P1] = TRUE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![P1] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED turn

(* Process P2's actions *)
P2Enter == /\ flag[P2] = FALSE
           /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![P2] = TRUE]
           /\ UNCHANGED turn

P2Try == /\ flag[P1] = TRUE
         /\ flag[P2] = TRUE
         /\ turn' = P1
         /\ UNCHANGED flag

P2Exit == /\ flag[P2] = TRUE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![P2] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED turn

Next == \/ P1Enter
        \/ P1Try
        \/ P1Exit
        \/ P2Enter
        \/ P2Try
        \/ P2Exit

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

(* Mutual exclusion invariant: both processes cannot be in the
   critical section simultaneously. *)
TypeOK == /\ flag \in [P1, P2 -> BOOLEAN]
           /\ turn \in {P1, P2}

====

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Nodes

(* Each node is identified by an integer in 1..N *)
ASSUME Nodes = 1..N

VARIABLES known, infected

(* known[i] is the set of updates node i knows about *)
(* infected[i] is a Boolean flag indicating whether node i has received the rumor *)

(* Initial state: all nodes know nothing and are not infected *)
Init == /\ known = [i \in Nodes |-> {}]
        /\ infected = [i \in Nodes |-> FALSE]

(* Helper to pick a random node to communicate with *)
RandomNode(i) == CHOOSE j \in Nodes : j # i

(* One step of the gossip protocol: node i contacts a random node j *)
Step(i) ==
  LET j == RandomNode(i) IN
  /\ i \in Nodes
  /\ j \in Nodes
  /\ j # i
  /\ known' = [k \in Nodes |-> IF k = i \/ k = j THEN
                           known[k] \cup known[j]

  /\ infected' = [k \in Nodes |-> IF k = i \/ k = j THEN
                           TRUE


(* Next-state relation |-> any node may act in any step *)
Next == \E i \in Nodes |-> Step(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

(* Invariant: all known sets are subsets of the set of all possible updates *)
TypeOK == \A i \in Nodes : known[i] \subseteq 1..N

====

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
CONSTANT Clients

Pages == 1..N

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Request(c, p) ==
    /\ p \in free
    /\ free' = free \ {p}
    /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]

Release(c, p) ==
    /\ p \in allocated[c]
    /\ free' = free \cup {p}
    /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]

Next == \E c \in Clients : \E p \in Pages :
            Request(c, p) \/ Release(c, p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Topics, Subscribers, Messages
VARIABLES inboxes, subscriptions


(* Helper: ensure a set is a subset of a given universe *)
SubsetOf(univ, s) == \A x \in s : x \in univ

(* Initial state: no subscriptions, empty inboxes *)
Init ==
    /\ subscriptions = [t \in Topics |-> {}]
    /\ inboxes = [s \in Subscribers |-> <<>>]

(* Action: a subscriber s subscribes to topic t *)
Subscribe(s, t) ==
    /\ s \in Subscribers
    /\ t \in Topics
    /\ subscriptions' = [subscriptions EXCEPT ![t] = @ \cup {s}]
    /\ inboxes' = inboxes

(* Action: a subscriber s unsubscribes from topic t *)
Unsubscribe(s, t) ==
    /\ s \in Subscribers
    /\ t \in Topics
    /\ subscriptions' = [subscriptions EXCEPT ![t] = @ \ {s}]
    /\ inboxes' = inboxes

(* Action: a publisher posts message m to topic t *)
Publish(m, t) ==
    /\ m \in Messages
    /\ t \in Topics
    /\ \E subs \in SubsetOf(Subscribers, subscriptions[t]) :
           /\ \A s \in subs : inboxes' = [inboxes EXCEPT ![s] = Append(@, m)]
           /\ \A s \in Subscribers \setminus subs : inboxes' = [inboxes EXCEPT ![s] = @]

(* Next-state relation: any of the above actions may occur *)
Next ==
    \E s \in Subscribers : \E t \in Topics :
        Subscribe(s, t) \/ Unsubscribe(s, t)
    \/ \E m \in Messages : \E t \in Topics :
        Publish(m, t)

(* Invariant: each inbox is a sequence of messages *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ subscriptions \in [Topics -> SUBSET Subscribers]
    /\ inboxes \in [Subscribers -> Seq(Messages)]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscriptions, inboxes>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS P1, P2

VARIABLES turn, wants, P1, P2

(* turn: either P1 or P2, indicating whose turn it is to enter the critical section
   wants: a function mapping each process to a boolean indicating whether it wants to enter
*)

(* Initial state: no process wants to enter, and turn is arbitrary *)
Init == /\ turn \in {P1, P2}
        /\ wants = [P1 |-> FALSE, P2 |-> FALSE]

(* Process P1's actions *)
P1Enter == /\ wants[P1] = FALSE
           /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![P1] = TRUE]
           /\ UNCHANGED turn

P1Exit == /\ wants[P1] = TRUE
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![P1] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED turn

P1Critical == /\ wants[P1] = TRUE
              /\ wants[P2] = FALSE
              /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, wants>>

P1Wait == /\ wants[P1] = TRUE
          /\ wants[P2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = P2
          /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, wants>>

P1Turn == /\ wants[P1] = TRUE
          /\ wants[P2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = P1
          /\ turn' = P2
          /\ UNCHANGED wants

(* Process P2's actions *)
P2Enter == /\ wants[P2] = FALSE
           /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![P2] = TRUE]
           /\ UNCHANGED turn

P2Exit == /\ wants[P2] = TRUE
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![P2] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED turn

P2Critical == /\ wants[P2] = TRUE
              /\ wants[P1] = FALSE
              /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, wants>>

P2Wait == /\ wants[P2] = TRUE
          /\ wants[P1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = P1
          /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, wants>>

P2Turn == /\ wants[P2] = TRUE
          /\ wants[P1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = P2
          /\ turn' = P1
          /\ UNCHANGED wants

(* Next-state relation: any process may perform one of its actions *)
Next == \/ P1Enter \/ P1Exit \/ P1Critical \/ P1Wait \/ P1Turn
        \/ P2Enter \/ P2Exit \/ P2Critical \/ P2Wait \/ P2Turn

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

(* Invariant: mutual exclusion *)
TypeOK == (wants[P1] /\ wants[P2]) = FALSE

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Nodes

(* Each node has a vector of counters, one per node *)
VARIABLES counts

(* Helper: vector addition *)
VecAdd(v1, v2) == [i \in 1..N |-> v1[i] + v2[i]]

(* Helper: element-wise maximum of two vectors *)
VecMax(v1, v2) == [i \in 1..N |-> IF v1[i] > v2[i] THEN v1[i] ELSE v2[i]]

(* Helper: sum of a vector *)
VecSum(v) == CHOOSE s \in Nat : s = +/v

(* Initial state: all counters zero *)
Init == counts = [i \in Nodes |-> [j \in Nodes |-> 0]]

(* Increment operation at node i *)
Inc(i) ==
  /\ i \in Nodes
  /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![i] = VecAdd(counts[i], [j \in Nodes |-> 1])]

(* Merge operation between nodes i and j *)
Merge(i, j) ==
  /\ i \in Nodes /\ j \in Nodes
  /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT
                 ![i] = VecMax(counts[i], counts[j]),
                 ![j] = VecMax(counts[j], counts[i])]

(* Next-state relation: any node may increment or any pair may merge *)
Next == \E i \in Nodes : Inc(i) \/ \E j \in Nodes : Merge(i, j)

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_counts

(* Invariant: all counters are nonnegative integers *)
TypeOK == \A i \in Nodes : \A j \in Nodes : counts[i][j] \in Nat

(* Total count is the sum of the maximum counter for each node *)
Total == CHOOSE t \in Nat :
  t = +/(\E i \in Nodes : MAX(counts[][i]))
